commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Have all the workers of iniquity no knowledge. who eat up my people as they eat bread, and call not upon the LORD. Augustine of Hippo 5. "Shall not all, who work iniquity, know. He threatens the judgment. "Who devour My people as the food of bread:" that is, daily. For the food of bread is daily food. Now they devour the people, who serve their own ends out of them, not referring their ministry to the glory of God, and the salvation of those over whom they are.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
